checks.expected: Gene_A and Gene_B are the only significantly differentially expressed genes between Control and Treatment
checks.actual: Gene_A (padj=4.37e-119, upregulated) and Gene_B (padj=5.57e-42, downregulated) are the only significant genes; 8 others non-significant
checks.notes: Core conclusion fully reproduced. The two-marker signature is identical to the paper.

deviations.likely_cause: DESeq2 version difference (1.42.1 vs 1.42.0) and apeglm shrinkage algorithm variation on small 10-gene dataset

deviations.deviation: P-values orders of magnitude more extreme than paper claims (e.g., Gene_A padj 4.37e-119 vs 0.0008)
deviations.likely_cause: DESeq2 version differences produce substantially different p-values on small datasets with strong effect sizes; anticipated in plan.md uncertainties
